metric_notes.success_rate: Mean over episodes of exp(-mean_MSE) between first predicted action chunk and logged expert (joint_velocity + gripper_position), same subsampling.
metric_notes.dataset_success_rate: Mean of per-episode RLDS final reward (sanity baseline).
metric_notes.gripper_heuristic_success_rate: Stacking proxy on predicted actions: close (<0.5 open) then open (>0.5) pattern on subsampled steps (secondary).
metric_notes.action_agreement_mse_mean: Mean squared-error vs logged 8D expert command (primary diagnostic).
